name: pomotimer
description: Pomodoro mobile app powered by Capacitor.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build:web && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:android: npm run build:web && npx cap open android
scripts.build:apk: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && mkdir -p ../downloads && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../downloads/pomotimer-debug.apk
scripts.build:release-apk: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd .. && mkdir -p downloads && STORE_PASS=$(sed -n 's/^storePassword=//p' keystore/release-signing.properties) && /opt/android-sdk/build-tools/35.0.0/apksigner sign --ks keystore/pomotimer-release.jks --ks-key-alias pomotimer --ks-pass pass:$STORE_PASS --key-pass pass:$STORE_PASS --out downloads/pomotimer-release.apk android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-unsigned.apk && node scripts/update-release-manifest.js
